# BP-134 positive: First errors are treated uniformly.
lang: go
file: BP-134-vulnerable.go
variant: gorm-first-uniform-error
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct{}

func loadUser(db *gorm.DB, user *User) error {
	if err := db.First(user).Error; err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return nil
}
